---
title: "cortex.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/cortex.py"
loc: 54
complexity: 11
logic_score: 1.72
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 8.81
overall_score: 4.86
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating Cortex, __init__. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 32 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `Cortex`
- `__init__`
- `_ingest`
- `query`
